allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('./test.db'\); console.log\('SQLite version:', db.prepare\('SELECT sqlite_version\(\)'\).get\(\)\); db.close\(\); require\('fs'\).unlinkSync\('./test.db'\)")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('local-data/db/homeapp.db'\); const rows = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id, title, fields FROM records WHERE category='identity'\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('local-data/db/homeapp.db'\); db.prepare\(\\"UPDATE records SET title='Daniel David Coakes' WHERE id='01KS2X0JJENACPQX57EGY1H71V'\\"\).run\(\); db.prepare\(\\"UPDATE records SET title='Imogen Sophie Rose Coakes' WHERE id='01KS2X0JJF7KSET1CV5J12H8AZ'\\"\).run\(\); console.log\('Done'\);")
